commit_message:
drt: PA minor refactoring drt: PA minor refactoring [Context] This used to be a huge, overwhelming PR, Its contents were splits in PRs #5760 #5770 #5778 #5783 and #5788. As those were merged this PR was updated to not included their changes ('drt: master merge' commits). What remains can be reviewed as a single PR.

This PR contains minor refactoring changes do the PA module
### Straight Forward Refactoring Decisions:
- some variables still needed snake_case.
- some spaces were added
- som
